summary: Script has good TypeScript practices (types, async/await, validation) but workflow critically incomplete: (1) Missing `bun test` step—task requires TDD with tests run via act; (2) `uses: actions/checkout@v4` not pinned to SHA; (3) Bun install from curl/bash not versioned; (4) Fixture paths (fixtures/config.json, fixtures/files.txt) hardcoded in env defaults but files not provided—workflow would fail; (5) No act-result.txt generation, no actionlint validation shown. Task requires validation via actionlint and test execution through act; neither present.
